overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage following a character through a dramatic volcanic landscape. The journey progresses from a narrow lava-filled canyon through steam vents toward ancient temple ruins under golden hour lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow volcanic canyon with flowing lava river

events.description: character turns right to navigate around rock outcrop in the canyon

agents.ego_description: running through narrow canyon alongside flowing lava river

entered.detail: river of orange molten lava flowing through the canyon below the path
steep jagged black rock walls forming the canyon sides
distant canyon walls creating an enclosed corridor

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow volcanic canyon with steep rock walls on either side. A river of glowing orange lava flows to the left while the path winds through rocky terrain. The sky is mostly obscured by the high canyon walls, creating a shadowed, enclosed environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: volcanic plateau with active steam geyser and ancient ruins

events.description: exits narrow canyon into open area with visible sky and large steam geyser
passing active steam geyser emitting tall white plume

agents.ego_description: running toward steam geyser with ancient ruins visible on the left hillside

entered.detail: tall erupting plume of white steam rising from volcanic vent
stone ruins of ancient structure built into the hillside

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the scene opens to reveal a volcanic plateau with a dramatic steam geyser erupting in the distance. Ancient stone ruins appear on the left hillside while the sky becomes visible above. The character continues running across the rocky terrain toward the geyser.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide volcanic plain with distant temple complex

events.description: entering wide open volcanic plain with panoramic view of distant temple structures

agents.ego_description: sprinting across open volcanic terrain toward distant temple structures on the horizon

entered.detail: large ancient temple with tall towers visible on the horizon surrounded by mist
narrow channel of flowing lava cutting through the plain
green jungle canopy visible around the temple structures in the distance

segments.scene_description: The landscape opens into a vast volcanic plain under a wide golden hour sky. In the distance, an ancient temple complex with tall towers rises above the tropical vegetation. The character runs across the rugged terrain, passing lava channels while the temple grows slowly larger on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach to ancient temple with active steam vents

events.description: entering field of active steam vents emitting mist from the ground
character slows slightly to navigate through rocky terrain and steam vents

agents.ego_description: approaching ancient temple ruins through field of steam vents and rugged rock formations

entered.detail: multiple small geothermal vents emitting steam from the rocky ground

segments.scene_description: Approaching the temple complex, the terrain becomes dotted with active steam vents emitting mist. The ancient temple structures are now clearly visible ahead, rising from the rocky landscape. The character navigates through the steam and rugged rocks as the destination draws nearer.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic volcanic canyon that gradually expands into a vast, open plain dominated by ancient ruins. It begins with the character running through a narrow gorge of steep rock walls beside a river of glowing orange lava, where the environment feels shadowed and enclosed. As the character emerges from the canyon, the scene opens onto a volcanic plateau where the sky becomes visible and a dramatic steam geyser erupts in the distance. The landscape then shifts into a wide volcanic plain under a golden hour sky, with the camera tracking the character past lava channels toward a distant temple complex rising above tropical vegetation. Finally, the terrain becomes dotted with active steam vents emitting mist as the character navigates the rugged rocks to approach the towering temple structures.
